Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 650
Receive ID 5D0
Functional Addr 415
Functional Name LEFT_HEAD_LAMP
